message:
chore(ci): bump GitHub Actions to latest major versions

Update all workflow action references to current major versions:
- actions/checkout v4 → v5
- actions/cache v4 → v5
- actions/upload-artifact v4 → v6
- actions/download-artifact v4 → v7
- peter-evans/repository-dispatch v3 → v4

Also fix dist.yml macOS Intel runner from deprecated macos-13 to
macos-15-intel, and quote $GITHUB_OUTPUT in notify-acfs.yml for
shellcheck compliance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -14,15 +14,15 @@ jobs:
   check:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v5
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
         with:
           components: rustfmt, clippy
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and target
-        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        uses: actions/cache@v5
         with:
           path: |
             ~/.cargo/registry
@@ -48,7 +48,7 @@ jobs:
   check-pcap:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v5
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
@@ -59,7 +59,7 @@ jobs:
         run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libpcap-dev
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and target
-        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        uses: actions/cache@v5
         with:
           path: |
             ~/.cargo/registry

@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ jobs:
   test:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v5
 
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
         with:
@@ -37,7 +37,7 @@ jobs:
           - os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
             target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
             artifact_name: rano
-          - os: macos-13
+          - os: macos-15-intel
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
             artifact_name: rano
           - os: macos-14
@@ -52,7 +52,7 @@ jobs:
       contents: write
 
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v5
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
@@ -84,7 +84,7 @@ jobs:
           "$hash  $zipName" | Out-File -Encoding ASCII "$zipName.sha256"
 
       - name: Upload artifact
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
         with:
           name: ${{ matrix.target }}
           path: dist/*
@@ -96,10 +96,10 @@ jobs:
       contents: write
 
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v5
 
       - name: Download all artifacts
-        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v7
         with:
           path: dist
           merge-multiple: true

@@ -33,7 +33,7 @@ jobs:
     if: github.event_name == 'push'
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v5
         with:
           fetch-depth: 1
 
@@ -51,11 +51,11 @@ jobs:
           fi
 
           SHA256=$(sha256sum "$INSTALLER_PATH" | cut -d' ' -f1)
-          echo "sha256=$SHA256" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "sha256=$SHA256" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
           echo "Computed SHA256: $SHA256"
 
       - name: Notify ACFS
-        uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v3
+        uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v4
         with:
           token: ${{ secrets.ACFS_DISPATCH_TOKEN }}
           repository: Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
@@ -82,7 +82,7 @@ jobs:
     if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v5
 
       - name: Install shellcheck
         run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y shellcheck

@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@ jobs:
   tag-release:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v5
         with:
           fetch-depth: 0
